name: WeWork 1155 Perimeter Center West
description: Located in the Perimeter Center business district, this location is ideal for Atlanta professionals working in the northern suburbs. Ample parking and easy highway access.

name: WeWork Coda
address: 756 W Peachtree St NW, Atlanta, GA 30308
description: Inside the landmark Coda tech campus in Midtown Atlanta. A hub for Georgia Tech alumni and the city's growing tech community. Steps from MARTA and Ponce City Market.

name: WeWork Colony Square
address: 1175 Peachtree St NE, Suite 1000, Atlanta, GA 30361
description: In the heart of Midtown Atlanta's newly redeveloped Colony Square mixed-use complex. Surrounded by restaurants, hotels, and galleries — a great base for Midtown meetings.

name: WeWork Terminus
description: Buckhead's premier business address in the Terminus towers. Popular with finance and law professionals in Atlanta's most upscale commercial corridor.

name: WeWork The RailYard South End
address: 1422 S Tryon Street, Suite 300, Charlotte, NC 28203
description: In Charlotte's vibrant South End neighborhood along the light rail line. Industrial-chic design with exposed brick and beams. A favorite among Charlotte's startup and creative community.

name: WeWork 615 S College St
description: Located in Uptown Charlotte's financial district. Steps from Bank of America Stadium and the city's major banks and law firms. Professional and polished.

name: WeWork 800 N High St
description: In the heart of the Short North Arts District, Columbus's most walkable and vibrant neighborhood. Surrounded by galleries, restaurants, and boutiques. Great for creatives.

name: WeWork Park Tower
address: 695 Town Center Dr., Suite 1100, Costa Mesa, CA 92626
description: At the Town Center in Costa Mesa, minutes from South Coast Plaza and John Wayne Airport. Popular with Orange County's business and entertainment professionals.

name: WeWork 120 West Trinity Place
description: Steps from Decatur Square in one of metro Atlanta's most beloved walkable communities. A relaxed, neighborhood feel with easy MARTA access.

name: WeWork Financial House
description: In the Cherry Creek neighborhood, Denver's upscale shopping and dining district. A quieter, boutique feel compared to downtown — popular with independent consultants and creatives.

name: WeWork Wells Fargo Center
description: On the 17th floor of the Wells Fargo Center with sweeping views of the Front Range. A premium downtown address in Denver's financial and legal corridor.

name: WeWork Tabor Center
description: In the heart of downtown Denver's 17th Street financial corridor. Mountain views on clear days. Hugely popular with outdoor-lifestyle entrepreneurs and remote workers.

name: WeWork The Circa Building
description: Located in LoHi (Lower Highland), one of Denver's trendiest neighborhoods. Walkable to the best restaurants and bars in the city, with easy bike access along the Platte River Trail.

name: WeWork Triangle Building
description: Steps from Denver's Union Station in the thriving LoDo neighborhood. Modern workspace in a prime transit-oriented location with easy access to the A-Line to DIA.

name: WeWork 2211 Michelson Dr
description: In the Irvine Business Complex, minutes from John Wayne Airport. A top choice for Orange County's finance, tech, and biotech professionals seeking a polished environment.

name: WeWork 400 Spectrum Center
description: Located at Irvine Spectrum, one of Southern California's premier mixed-use destinations. Great for entrepreneurs and teams looking for a vibrant, amenity-rich environment.

name: WeWork 200 Spectrum Center
address: 200 Spectrum Center Drive, Suite 300, Irvine, CA 92618
description: Just steps from 400 Spectrum Center, this location offers additional capacity in one of Irvine's busiest business corridors. Ample parking and transit access.

name: WeWork Lightwell
description: Located in the landmark Lightwell building in downtown Kansas City. Stunning atrium and natural light throughout. A flagship creative workspace for KC's growing startup scene.

name: WeWork Innovation Pointe
description: In the heart of Utah's Silicon Slopes tech corridor. Minutes from dozens of tech startups and enterprise companies. Mountain views and ample parking make this a Silicon Slopes staple.

name: WeWork 729 N Washington Ave
address: 729 N Washington Avenue, Suite 600, Minneapolis, MN 55401
description: In Minneapolis's North Loop neighborhood, one of the city's trendiest areas with boutique shops and award-winning restaurants. Along the riverfront with great natural light.

name: WeWork 901 Woodland St
description: In East Nashville's Eastwood Neighbors area, one of Music City's most creative and diverse communities. A favorite among Nashville's musicians, entrepreneurs, and tech workers.

name: WeWork 18th & Chet
description: Named for the intersection of 18th Ave S and Chet Atkins Pl, just steps from Music Row. A creative environment for Nashville's entertainment, media, and marketing professionals.

name: WeWork 2201 Broadway
description: In Uptown Oakland, steps from BART and surrounded by the city's vibrant arts and restaurant scene. A more affordable alternative to San Francisco with the same Bay Area energy.

name: WeWork 1900 Market St
description: On Market Street in Center City Philadelphia, one block from 30th Street Station. A major commuter hub with excellent transit access from all Philly suburbs and New Jersey.

name: WeWork 1100 Ludlow St
description: Steps from Jefferson Station and the Avenue of the Arts in Center City. A creative workspace in Philly's cultural heart, popular with the city's growing tech and media industries.

name: WeWork 2425 E Camelback Rd
address: 2425 East Camelback Road, Suite 150, Phoenix, AZ 85016
description: In the Camelback Corridor, Phoenix's premier business district. Close to luxury hotels, fine dining, and the Biltmore Fashion Park. Popular with real estate and financial professionals.

name: WeWork 830 NE Holladay St
description: In Portland's Lloyd District near the Convention Center and MAX light rail. Great for remote workers commuting from across the metro. Very bike-friendly with excellent amenities.

name: WeWork 400 Capitol Mall
description: A landmark address on Capitol Mall in downtown Sacramento, steps from the State Capitol. Ideal for government affairs professionals, lobbyists, and public policy consultants.

name: WeWork Gateway 6
address: 460 West 50 North, Salt Lake City, UT 84101
description: At The Gateway complex in downtown Salt Lake City, steps from the TRAX light rail and Vivint Arena. Surrounded by restaurants and shops with stunning Wasatch Mountain views.

name: WeWork 1201 3rd Ave
description: In downtown Seattle's financial district at one of the city's most prestigious addresses. Steps from Pike Place Market, the waterfront, and Amazon's HQ campus. Ideal for corporate teams.

name: WeWork 1448 NW Market St
address: 1448 NW Market St, Suite 500, Seattle, WA 98107
description: In Seattle's Ballard neighborhood, one of the city's most vibrant communities with a thriving food and brewery scene. A relaxed, neighborhood workspace perfect for creatives and remote workers.

name: WeWork Holyoke Building
description: In the historic Holyoke Building in downtown Seattle, a stone's throw from Pike Place Market. Charming character and modern amenities blend seamlessly. Great views of Puget Sound.

name: WeWork Hawk Tower
address: 255 S King St, Ste 800, Seattle, WA 98104
description: Steps from T-Mobile Park and Climate Pledge Arena in Seattle's SoDo/International District. A tech-forward workspace popular with Seattle's gaming and sports-tech industries.

name: WeWork Place
description: In downtown Tampa's central business district on Kennedy Boulevard. Easy access to the Tampa Bay Times Forum and the Riverwalk. A hub for Tampa's fast-growing tech and finance scene.

name: WeWork The Watermark
address: 410 North Scottsdale Road, Suite 1000, Tempe, AZ 85281
description: At the Watermark complex in Tempe Town Lake, with stunning water and mountain views. Steps from ASU's main campus and Tempe's thriving nightlife and restaurant corridor.
